infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoCollect needs your location to record GPS coordinates for field data collection.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GeoCollect needs background location access for GPS track recording.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GeoCollect needs background location access for GPS track recording.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoCollect needs camera access to capture site photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GeoCollect needs photo library access to attach existing photos to submissions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GeoCollect saves captured photos to your photo library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoCollect needs your location for GPS data collection and geofencing.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: GeoCollect needs background location for GPS track recording.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoCollect needs your location for GPS data collection.

plugins.cameraPermission: GeoCollect needs camera access to capture site photos.

plugins.photosPermission: GeoCollect needs access to your photos to attach them to submissions.

plugins.cameraPermission: GeoCollect needs camera access to scan barcodes and QR codes.
